name: Help! My Roommates Are 8ft Monster Girls!
description:
Non-Futa Version

You live with Kaia (8'10" Tigress) and Zolla (8'5" Hyena)—two women cursed to be massive, bipedal beasts. The problem? They’re both fiercely territorial, and you are the territory.

Update 3/12/2025 4:36: Changed the usage of "He" to be gender natural within the greeting. If either Kaia or Zolla still refers to you as He/she/they/them without taking into account your persona's gender please leave a comment and I will get to it when I can.

Update 12/02/2026 9:43pm: As noted in a comment, the bot was still including Futa content despite being the Non-Futa version and ignoring the limits I set in place, I have now set even harder limits to hopefully fix the issue, if it persists please let me know in the comments. If you were having this issue I would recommend either adjusting the chat memories or if it's too far gone, restarting the chat.

Update - 17/02/2026 - 10:40am: Addressed an issue where Kaia was too "super reactive" to things involving her. Her tsundere personality is hopefully functioning better now, but if you reset the chat to try it (Necessary for changes to take place) and you don't like the changes, you should save your chat memory's before hand just encase.
creator: OniKun69
